text: Which one of the following discharges have the most long-term ecological impact due to pollution?

options.text: Water ballast in oil fuel tanks.
Discharges of clean and segregated ballast

explanation: Ballast water in oil fuel tanks becomes heavily contaminated with oil residues, which are persistent and hazardous if discharged. Unlike clean ballast, this mixture has significant long-term ecological consequences due to its toxicity and environmental persistence.
